additions: Added HashSet<String> field 'marked_cards' to App struct
Three new public methods: toggle_mark(), clear_marks(), action_target_ids()
crates/bop-cli/src/ui/app.rs.pattern: Multi-select state tracking using efficient set membership
crates/bop-cli/src/ui/app.rs.initialization: marked_cards initialized as empty HashSet in App::new()

additions: Esc key handler: calls app.clear_marks() in Normal mode
Bulk action support in handle_action_popup: iterate over app.action_target_ids()
crates/bop-cli/src/ui/input.rs.bulk_action_flow: For Pause/Kill/Retry: get targets, loop dispatch, clear marks, return to Normal
crates/bop-cli/src/ui/input.rs.special_case: Logs action remains single-card only (enters LogTail mode)

additions: card_to_list_item() now accepts is_marked: bool parameter
Mark indicator: '■ ' prefix in Cyan color prepended to card line
crates/bop-cli/src/ui/widgets/kanban.rs.rendering_optimization: Clone marked_cards set before column loop to avoid borrow conflicts

patterns_discovered.name: Yazi-style multi-select
patterns_discovered.implementation: Tab toggles membership in HashSet, Esc clears all, visual indicator (■) shows state
patterns_discovered.benefit: Familiar UX for users of yazi file manager

patterns_discovered.name: Bulk action dispatcher pattern
patterns_discovered.implementation: action_target_ids() returns Vec of IDs: either marked_cards or single selected card
patterns_discovered.benefit: Single code path handles both single and bulk operations

patterns_discovered.name: Borrow conflict avoidance in render loop
patterns_discovered.implementation: Clone HashSet before entering mutable column iteration
patterns_discovered.rationale: marked_cards is typically small; clone cost is negligible vs borrow complexity

patterns_discovered.name: Selective bulk operation support
patterns_discovered.implementation: Logs action is single-card only, Pause/Kill/Retry apply to all marked
patterns_discovered.constraint: LogTail mode only makes sense for one card's stream

gotchas_discovered.issue: Borrow checker conflict in render_column loop
gotchas_discovered.root_cause: Mutable borrow of app.columns[i] conflicts with immutable borrow of app.marked_cards
gotchas_discovered.solution: Clone marked_cards set before loop (O(n) where n is typically 1-10 cards)

gotchas_discovered.root_cause: card_to_list_item() signature changed to include is_marked parameter
gotchas_discovered.impact: 6 test functions require is_marked argument updates
gotchas_discovered.lesson: Signature changes in heavily-tested functions require systematic test updates

gotchas_discovered.issue: Single-card Logs action incompatible with bulk operations
gotchas_discovered.root_cause: LogTail reads a single card's log stream; cannot meaningfully show multiple streams
gotchas_discovered.solution: Logs explicitly calls app.enter_log_tail() on selected_card() only, skips bulk dispatch

gotchas_discovered.future_consideration: Marks clear on Esc; behavior when card is deleted/moved TBD

quality_metrics: 3 clean methods added to App for multi-select logic
2 input handlers (Tab, Esc) with clear semantics
Rendering layer updated with visual indicator
All 6 affected tests updated to match new signature
No unsafe code or complexity hotspots
approach_outcome.architectural_cleanliness: State (marked_cards) in App, input handling in input.rs, rendering in kanban.rs — proper separation of concerns
approach_outcome.backward_compatibility: Marked state is optional; single-card workflow unaffected when no marks set

recommendations.action: Add optional status_message when mark is toggled (e.g., 'Card marked', 'Card unmarked')
recommendations.justification: Visual feedback for mark state change improves discoverability

recommendations.action: Document that Logs action is single-card only due to UART stream semantics
recommendations.justification: Prevents user confusion when Logs doesn't bulk-apply like other actions

recommendations.action: Add test_multi_select_flow() in input.rs tests: Tab → mark card → action popup → Pause → verify marks cleared
recommendations.justification: End-to-end test of multi-select + bulk action interaction

recommendations.action: Consider using Arc<HashSet<String>> if marked_cards is cloned frequently in future rendering
recommendations.justification: Current clone is fine for typical 1-10 cards; larger worksets might benefit from shared ownership

recommendations.action: Verify behavior when marked card is deleted/moved by dispatcher between mark toggle and action execution
recommendations.justification: Race condition: dispatch_action_* might fail silently on missing card ID
